original text: UMT now offers graduation cap, gown, tassel and hood through Jostens. UMT started offering college rings and diploma frames in 2007 through Jostens. To order yours, please go to:http://college.jostens.com/jostens/index.jsp?t=1&affiliateId=1645812&_requestid=519041. Please note that Jostens handles all orders and fulfillment.
